sentences.arabic: نَظَّمَ النَّادِي الثَّقَافِيُّ رِحْلَةً إِلَى الْجَبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Kulturni klub organizovao je izlet na planinu.
sentences.translationEn: The cultural club organized a trip to the mountain.

sentences.translation: Učesnici su hodali dva sata i uživali u prirodi.
sentences.translationEn: The participants walked for two hours and enjoyed nature.

sentences.arabic: الْتَقَطَ الْجَمِيعُ صُوَرًا جَمِيلَةً مِنَ الْقِمَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Svi su slikali lijepe fotografije s vrha.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone took beautiful photos from the summit.

sentences.arabic: أَكَلُوا الْغَدَاءَ فِي الطَّبِيعَةِ وَعَادُوا مَسَاءً.
sentences.translation: Ručali su u prirodi i vratili se navečer.
sentences.translationEn: They had lunch in nature and returned in the evening.
